Timed out after waiting `90000ms` for your remote page to load.

Your page did not fire its `load` event within `90000ms`.

You can try increasing the `pageLoadTimeout` value in `home/runner/work/AutomationExercise/AutomationExercise/automationexercise/Cypress/cypress.config.js` to wait longer.

Browsers will not fire the `load` event until all stylesheets and scripts are done downloading.

When this `load` event occurs, Cypress will continue running commands.
